SEARCH
Package eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.model

Class AIcDocumentationParagraph

java.lang.Object
eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.model.AIcDocumentationElement
eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.model.AIcDocumentationBlockElement
eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.model.AIcDocumentationParagraph
All Implemented Interfaces:
AIiDocumentationBlockElement, AIiDocumentationBlockElementWriteAccess, AIiDocumentationElement, AIiDocumentationElementWriteAccess, AIiDocumentationParagraph, AIiDocumentationParagraphWriteAccess
public class AIcDocumentationParagraph extends AIcDocumentationBlockElement implements AIiDocumentationParagraphWriteAccess
Default implementation of AIiDocumentationParagraphWriteAccess.

See AIiDocumentationParagraph for the read-only paragraph contract.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    AIcDocumentationParagraph(String aElementId)
    Creates an empty paragraph.
    AIcDocumentationParagraph(String aElementId, List<? extends AIiDocumentationInlineElement> aInlineElements)
    Creates a paragraph initialized with inline elements.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    addInlineCode(String aElementId, String aCode)
    Creates and adds an inline code element.

    addInlineElement(AIiDocumentationInlineElement aInlineElement)
    Adds an inline element at the end of the paragraph.
    void
    addInlineElements(List<? extends AIiDocumentationInlineElement> aInlineElements)
    Adds multiple inline elements in the provided order.

    Creates and adds an explicit line break.

    Creates and adds a semantic inline reference.

    Creates and adds a plain text inline element.

    • AIcDocumentationParagraph

      public AIcDocumentationParagraph(String aElementId)
      Creates an empty paragraph.
      Parameters:
      aElementId - stable element identifier

    • AIcDocumentationParagraph

      public AIcDocumentationParagraph(String aElementId, List<? extends AIiDocumentationInlineElement> aInlineElements)
      Creates a paragraph initialized with inline elements.
      Parameters:
      aElementId - stable element identifier
      aInlineElements - initial inline elements in rendering order

    • getInlineElements

      public List<AIiDocumentationInlineElement> getInlineElements()
      Description copied from interface: AIiDocumentationParagraph
      Returns paragraph inline elements in their rendering order.
      Specified by:
      getInlineElements in interface AIiDocumentationParagraph
      Returns:
      read-only ordered inline element list

      Adds an inline element at the end of the paragraph.

      addInlineElement in interface AIiDocumentationParagraphWriteAccess
      Parameters:
      aInlineElement - inline element to add

      public void addInlineElements(List<? extends AIiDocumentationInlineElement> aInlineElements)

      Adds multiple inline elements in the provided order.

      public void addText(String aElementId, String aText)
      Description copied from interface: AIiDocumentationParagraphWriteAccess
      Creates and adds a plain text inline element.
      Specified by:
      addText in interface AIiDocumentationParagraphWriteAccess
      Parameters:
      aElementId - stable identifier of the created text element
      aText - plain text content

      public void addLineBreak(String aElementId)

      Creates and adds an explicit line break.

      addLineBreak in interface AIiDocumentationParagraphWriteAccess
      Parameters:
      aElementId - stable identifier of the created line break element

    • addLink

      public void addLink(String aElementId, String aLabel, String aTarget, String aTitle)
      Description copied from interface: AIiDocumentationParagraphWriteAccess
      Creates and adds a non-semantic inline link.
      Specified by:
      addLink in interface AIiDocumentationParagraphWriteAccess
      Parameters:
      aElementId - stable identifier of the created link element
      aLabel - human-readable link label
      aTarget - renderer-neutral link target
      aTitle - human-readable link title, or an empty string if unavailable

    • addReference

      public void addReference(String aElementId, String aLabel, AIiDocumentationReferenceTarget aReferenceTarget, String aTitle)
      Description copied from interface: AIiDocumentationParagraphWriteAccess
      Creates and adds a semantic inline reference.
      Specified by:
      addReference in interface AIiDocumentationParagraphWriteAccess
      Parameters:
      aElementId - stable identifier of the created reference element
      aLabel - human-readable reference label, or an empty string if it should be derived
      aReferenceTarget - structured semantic reference target
      aTitle - human-readable reference title, or an empty string if unavailable

    • addInlineCode

      public void addInlineCode(String aElementId, String aCode)
      Description copied from interface: AIiDocumentationParagraphWriteAccess
      Creates and adds an inline code element.
      Specified by:
      addInlineCode in interface AIiDocumentationParagraphWriteAccess
      Parameters:
      aElementId - stable identifier of the created inline code element
      aCode - inline code text
